message:
fix: use explicit DOLT_ADD to prevent config corruption from stale working set (GH#2455)

DOLT_COMMIT('-Am') staged ALL dirty tables in the working set, which could
sweep up stale config changes from concurrent operations — corrupting
issue_prefix. Replace with explicit DOLT_ADD for only the tables each
operation modifies, plus defense-in-depth detection/restoration in Commit().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
